title: lithocardium foliolosum
intro: Lithocardium foliolosum, also known as leafy lithocardium, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include being a cardiotonic agent, helping to regulate heartbeat and blood pressure. The health benefits of lithocardium foliolosum include its ability to reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and provide relief from anxiety and insomnia. Lithocardium foliolosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its availability and use may vary due to its classification as a potentially toxic plant.
